title: Papyrus #0202: Greek-Egyptian Loan
description: A Greek papyrus from Hellenistic/Roman Egypt — loan document.
introduction: A Greek papyrus from Hellenistic/Roman Egypt — loan document.

translation.text: From the papyrus collections of Greco-Roman Egypt: a loan document preserved in the dry sands. These papyri document daily life in ways no monumental inscription can.
